title: Opur
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Opur |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Car'das/Legends|Car'das smugglers]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Opur, make certain the children are secured somewhere. I don't want one hair on their little Jedi heads harmed.''"
"''Yes, sir.|Talon Karrde and Opur|}} '''Opur''' was [[Gender/Legends|male]] individual who served as security officer on the ''[[Wild Karrde]]'' in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] during [[Talon Karrde]]'s [[Invasion of Yavin 4|mission]] to rescue the [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi trainees]] from a [[Peace Brigade]] attack at the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. During the operation, Karrde ordered Opur to make sure the [[Youngling/Legends|children]] were secured, a task which he hurried to complete. ==Behind the scenes== Opur first appeared in the [[2001]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'', written by [[Greg Keyes]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Opur }} [[Category:Car'das members]] [[Category:Guards]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Males]]
